description: CompositionBlue ethnic print kurti made of 100% cotton, has three-quarter sleeves, round neckline with a slit on the front, printed panel border on the sleeve hems, printed panel that extends from the neckline till the bust with a metallic thread tape border, and a vented hemFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry inside out in shadeWarm ironThis piece of art by aurelia is designed to accentuate your femininity. Look stylish in this ethnic kurti and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look or wear it when hanging out with your friends by teaming it with denims and flats for a casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtisHeight-5.7", Chest-33"
